suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when dwg-fixture-worker may be used for parser end-to-end regression coverage that adds tests but no new fixture assets, or retag such features to dwg-parser-worker when the work is primarily assertion coverage.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature dwg-parser-end-to-end-failclosed-and-facade-compile was assigned dwg-fixture-worker, but review found commit b14a6ca only changed crates/h7cad-native-dwg/tests/read_headers.rs with no fixture/manifests updates.

rejectedObservations.observation: Record resolver provenance in shared state because resolver scaffolding predates feature commit 3e180b1.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous; useful historical context, but not a concrete operational/library/services update and not clearly systemic guidance for future workers.
